text: As I gaze into this sterile, brightly lit corridor reflected in shiny glass, a sense of tranquil anticipation washes over me. The clean lines and empty hall hint at potential encounters or solitary pondering. Moving into the vibrant, information-rich exhibition area, I feel a spark of curiosity. The bold colors and talk of research and development awaken excitement for discovery. Here, my mind is stimulated and alert; I am poised on the edge of learning something new about how humans and machines connect. I feel both small in the vastness of innovation and empowered by the possibilities of creation.
